Prior knowledge distillation techniques are ineffective in producing student models with vocabularies different from the original teacher models because the teacher model parameters are typically projected directly onto the
answer: While there has been existing work on reducing NLP model vocabulary sizes BIBREF15, distillation techniques cannot utilize these, since they require the student and teacher models to share the same vocabulary and output space.
